purpose: Machine-readable positive and negative cases for Claude skill structure validation.

cases.description: Valid skill folder with required SKILL.md, matching name, and trigger description.

files.content:
---
name: valid-skill
description: Use when validating a minimal correct skill.
---
# Valid Skill

## Purpose

A valid minimal skill.

cases.description: Skill folder name must be kebab-case.

files.content:
---
name: Invalid_Skill
description: Use when validating folder naming.
---
# Invalid Skill

cases.description: Every skill folder must contain SKILL.md.
SKILL.md must begin with YAML-style frontmatter.
Frontmatter name must match folder name.

files.content:
---
name: other-name
description: Use when validating name matching.
---
# Expected Name

cases.description: Description must include trigger context using Use when.

files.content:
---
name: missing-trigger-context
description: Validates a skill description without required trigger words.
---
# Missing Trigger Context

cases.description: Individual skill folders must not contain README.md.

files.content:
---
name: nested-readme
description: Use when validating README restrictions.
---
# Nested README
# Not allowed inside a skill folder

cases.description: Unexpected parent-level files under .claude/skills should fail unless explicitly allowed.
